# ReadWriteSetProvider

Extract the set of storage relations a program reads and writes by walking its instruction sequence , and classify the program s purity as pure , read only , or read write

## Commands

### analyze
Walk the instruction tree . Get and Find instructions contribute 
 to the readSet . Put and Del instructions contribute to the 
 writeSet . Branch nodes union both sub branches conservatively . 
 Purity : no storage ops is pure , only reads is read only , 
 any write is read write .

**Arguments:** `$0` **program** (string)
